structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-08-06 Arizona is Home for Tucson and Pima County - Live Now
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-08-06 08:50:41-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

The Pima Tucson edition of the Arizona is Home Down Payment Assistance Program is live! Funds are limited to the first 75 homebuyers, so act quickly to help your clients take advantage of this opportunity. Rates <https://www.ehousingplus.com/homeownership/pima-tucson-homebuyer-solution-pths/program-highlights/>  are available and ready to lock.

PRICING COLOR



IMPORTANT NOTES

*	Guidelines <https://files.constantcontact.com/6a60ea0a401/12c4e0fa-5f83-4464-a658-eba89383f658.pdf?rdr=true> 
*	Please refer to the attached announcement for program details
*	Available for properties in Tucson and Pima County

 

ATTACHMENTS

*	Marketing materials
*	Previous announcement that contains program details

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

Contact Us: 

Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>         Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com>         Product Department <mailto:productdept@novahomeloans.com>
